name: EPLL
description: Edge Permutation of the Last Layer - 4 cases. Used in ZZ, Petrus, and other EO-first methods where edges are already oriented after OLL, leaving only edge permutation.

algorithms.name: EPLL Ua
algorithms.notation: M2 U M U2 M' U M2

alternatives.notation: R U' R U R U R U' R' U' R2
y2 R2 U' R' U' R U R U R U' R

algorithms.name: EPLL Ub
algorithms.notation: M2 U' M U2 M' U' M2

alternatives.notation: R2 U R U R' U' R' U' R' U R'
y2 R' U R' U' R' U' R' U R U R2

algorithms.name: EPLL H
algorithms.notation: M2 U M2 U2 M2 U M2

alternatives.notation: R2 U2 R U2 R2 U2 R2 U2 R U2 R2

algorithms.name: EPLL Z
algorithms.notation: M' U M2 U M2 U M' U2 M2

alternatives.notation: M2 U M2 U M' U2 M2 U2 M'
U M' U M2 U M2 U M' U2 M2 U'
